name: Ike
description: Ike is the central character of Fire Emblem: Path of Radiance and one of the main characters in Fire Emblem: Radiant Dawn. He is the son of Greil and Elena, as well as the older brother of Mist. He is also the fearless leader of the Greil Mercenaries and the first and only main character who is not of noble birth. name: Kaga
description: A calm and no-nonsense bow-wielding shipgirl based on the real-life Japanese aircraft carrier Kaga. Sister ship to [Akagi](https://anilist.co/character/174622/Akagi). In the *Shimakaze Tsumujikaze no Shoujo* manga, she's given a considerably darker characterization than in the first anime and *Fubuki, Ganbarimasu* 4koma, as she states her siblings "never got a chance to be born" and deems her very existence a mistake. However, she ends up bonding with Shimakaze over their mutual feelings.

name: Kagero
description: Kagero is the only female warrior of the Koga Ninja that is sent to investigate the mysterious deaths in Shimota village due to an even more mysterious plague. Her main job is as a "poison taster" for her master's food. It turns out that she is totally immune to poison, due the fact that her blood itself is a deadly poison. name: Kaoru Hanawa
description: Fu's first and best friend and one of the few people who understands her beyond her "weirdness". She was the first person to talk to Fu when she first transferred to their school, and was able to slightly get her over her shyness.

name: Katai Tayama
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") __Ability:__ Futon He is an information broker for the Armed Detective Company. He used to be a member of the Agency, and has known Kunikida for ten years.

name: Katsuma Shimano
description: A resident of Nabu Island and the younger brother of Mahoro. His Quirk is Cell Activation, which invigorates and restores damaged cells.

name: Ken Ishiyama
description: Cementoss is a Pro Hero as well as a teacher at U.A. High School. During the U.A. Sports Festival, he acted as the proctor for the 1-on-1 fights in case things got out of hand. He also faced off against Eijiro Kirishima and Rikido Sato in their Final Exam.

name: Koromo Amae
description: Premier member of the reigning champion Mahjong team, Ryuumonbuchi, and one of the most idolized yet feared players in the game. She is said to be possessed by a demon when playing; she even outranked a professional Mahjong player at a previous tournament. She is also the key player that brings an end to Kazekoshi's winning streak.
